title: roasted massivley korean flour bao
description: soft and fluffy korean bao filled with melted cheese and served with a side of spicy dipping sauce, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner

ingredients.name: instant yeast
ingredients.notes: make sure to use instant yeast for the best results

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher or sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use warm water around 100f to 110f for the best results

ingredients.name: mozzarella cheese
ingredients.notes: you can use other types of cheese like cheddar or parmesan as well

ingredients.name: green onions
ingredients.notes: use thinly sliced green onions for the best results

ingredients.name: sesame oil
ingredients.notes: use sesame oil for the best flavor

instructions: combine the flour, yeast, and salt in a large mixing bowl
add the warm water and mix until a shaggy dough forms
knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
place the dough in a greased bowl and let it rise for 1 hour
punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces
roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle
place the dough circles in a greased baking sheet
sprinkle the mozzarella cheese and gochujang on top of the dough circles
bake for 15 minutes until the cheese is melted and the dough is golden brown
remove from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes
serve with a side of spicy dipping sauce
sprinkle green onions and drizzle with sesame oil
